_provenance.note: Re-pinned from parent's compute_sto_coefficients optimizer output. Prior pinned values (committed in earlier engagement phase) drifted ~5e-6 at P=5,cfl=0.4 vs current SciPy; this is consistent with SLSQP local-minimum sensitivity in the LS objective. The pin assertion (test_pinned_sto_coefficients) locks reproducibility against the current SciPy environment; if SciPy is upgraded and these values move materially, regenerate by running `compute_sto_coefficients(P, cfl)` for each entry and committing the new file.
